nextSteps: Important: Before working on the project make sure to read the README.md file in the workspace root directory.
Build for macOS: xcodebuildmcp macos build --workspace-path <TMPDIR>/macos/SnapshotTestMacApp.xcworkspace --scheme SnapshotTestMacApp
Build & Run on macOS: xcodebuildmcp macos build-and-run --workspace-path <TMPDIR>/macos/SnapshotTestMacApp.xcworkspace --scheme SnapshotTestMacApp
